title: Autodesk: Sustainable Growth And Profound AI Opportunities At A Price
text: Autodesk has a dominant position in the market, giving it strong pricing power in the design and engineering software industry. The company's focus on AI-driven solutions and its expansion into the European market offer opportunities for future growth.
